lingerSeconds.Name: lingerSeconds
lingerSeconds.Description: How long in seconds to keep the widget visible after a prompt completes or expires before hiding it.

startedSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt starts up

successSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt completes

failSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt expires on failure

GoogleFonts.description: Additional google fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.

CdnFonts.description: Additional cdn fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.
